title: 00-ideation-brief.md (plan) runtime body-structure contract
description: Hook-consumable runtime artifact for plan-tree 00-ideation-brief.md files. Frozen-post-Session-1 body with amendment-pointer-block prepend pattern. Conditional plan-folder quartet member per Plan 81 SP13 Session 2 A23 (gates at planned → in-progress for manifest.research_driven: true). Authored by SP14 Batch A T-13.5 (2026-05-18).

_design_notes.consumer: hooks/pre-write-guard.sh (body-immutability enforcement post first amendment-pointer-block) + librarian plan-index
_design_notes.evolution_protocol: Body frozen post-Session-1; amendments via prepended amendment-pointer-block referencing canonical reference. Body preserved as Session 0 research record.

frozen_rationale: Body preserved as Session 0 research record; subsequent decision shifts captured via amendment-pointer-blocks rather than in-place edits.
amendment_pattern: amendment-pointer-block at top of body referencing canonical reference; body preserved as Session 0 research record
